name: Chinese Coleslaw a La Poggi
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the top ramen noodles apart and brown them in butter using a skillet. Be careful not to grind the noodles; cook until crisp. Set aside.
2. In the same skillet, brown green onions, sunflower seeds, and almond slivers with remaining butter. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. Mix oil, sugar, balsamic vinegar, and ramen seasoning in a bowl or jar to make the dressing. Stir well.
4. Do not mix ingredients until you are ready to serve.
